processes.name: DocAction_Process
processes.description: Process/Complete the customer RMA document. On completion, generates return receipt and optionally a customer credit memo

steps.name: validateLines
steps.description: Ensure at least one RMA line exists

steps.name: validateQuantities
steps.description: Ensure all line quantities are valid and do not exceed original shipment

edgeCases.name: excessQuantity
edgeCases.trigger: Return quantity exceeds original shipment qty
